summary: Iter-8 retest after the /embed → /api/embed route move. ALL GREEN: 25/25 backend pytest pass + full frontend Share-page embed flow verified. Public widget URL https://<preview>/api/embed/<slug> now correctly returns the FastAPI iframe HTML (200, text/html, X-Frame-Options: ALLOWALL, Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors *, body contains 'TokenForge savings — TokenForge Admin' title + live tokens/$/requests numbers). Unknown-slug returns 404 with the 'no longer active' HTML fallback (not JSON detail, not React SPA). ?theme=light correctly emits #FFFFFF background palette. /api/widget.js IIFE body references the new '/api/embed/' path (and no longer the bare '/embed/' on the same host). Share.jsx embed-preview-iframe src is now `${BACKEND_URL}/api/embed/${slug}?theme=${theme}` and the iframe rendered content (read via Playwright contentFrame()) contains 'TokenForge savings' + 'TokenForge' brand + the savings numbers, NOT the React landing meta. embed-theme-light toggle updates BOTH the snippet's data-tf-theme attribute AND the live iframe src to ?theme=light (verified the iframe HTML then contains #FFFFFF). All prior critical regression flows (auth/me admin, register-then-me, optimize public, billing plans+monthly+annual checkout, reports/savings.pdf, dashboard overview, admin/overview RBAC ok+forbidden, share create+get with avg_pct cap) remain green. Internal-localhost tests were updated to hit http://localhost:8001/api/embed/ since the old @app.get root-level route was removed. The previously-flagged over-strict #0A0A0A assertion was relaxed (incidental occurrences in font references). Net: 6/6 previously-failing tests now pass + 19/19 previously-passing tests still pass = 25/25.

minor.issue: HEAD returns Content-Type application/json (FastAPI auto-HEAD doesn't preserve the GET response's media_type). GET works correctly with application/javascript. Cosmetic — <script src> uses GET.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py — route move to @api.get('/embed/{slug}') is clean; widget_loader IIFE now correctly appends '/api/embed/'. Confirmed via live curl + Playwright contentFrame.

Iframe sandbox 'allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups' still triggers a browser warning (these two flags together let the iframe escape sandboxing). Acceptable since the widget is first-party; consider dropping allow-same-origin in a future hardening pass for stricter posture.
Optional: add execCommand('copy') fallback for Share.jsx copy button in older browsers / iframe contexts where navigator.clipboard rejects (current graceful toast fallback is fine).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py (updated TestEmbedPagePublic to hit {API}/embed/ and TestEmbedPageInternal to hit localhost:8001/api/embed/; loosened the #0A0A0A assertion in test_embed_internal_light_palette per iter-7 note)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Share embed flow end-to-end verified — iframe renders FastAPI widget, dark/light theme toggle updates both snippet text and iframe src, savings numbers + TokenForge brand visible inside the iframe)

test_credentials: admin@tokenforge.io / ForgeAdmin!2026 — admin slug Hq2gSRLFuypZ already exists.
seed_data_creation: Reused admin slug Hq2gSRLFuypZ. Ephemeral TEST_iter7_*@example.com throwaway users for register/RBAC regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-8 embed route fix fully verified end-to-end. Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py (25 tests, all green). For future iters: public widget URL is now /api/embed/<slug> (NOT /embed/<slug>); the old @app.get root-level route has been removed entirely. /api/widget.js IIFE builds origin + '/api/embed/' + slug. Share.jsx iframe src is `${BACKEND_URL}/api/embed/${slug}?theme=${theme}`. Read iframe content via Playwright `iframe_el.content_frame()` then `frame.content()` to verify it's the FastAPI widget HTML and not the React SPA. To re-read iframe src after a theme toggle, re-query via `page.get_attribute('[data-testid="embed-preview-iframe"]', 'src')` (don't reuse the old handle — React replaces the iframe DOM node when src changes).
rca_of_the_issue: Iter-7 RCA confirmed and resolved: changing @app.get('/embed/{slug}') → @api.get('/embed/{slug}') moves the public path under /api/, which the Kubernetes ingress routes to FastAPI (port 8001). Loader string and Share.jsx iframe src were updated in lockstep. Verified by: (a) `curl https://<preview>/api/embed/Hq2gSRLFuypZ` → 200 text/html with TokenForge savings title + ALLOWALL XFO + frame-ancestors *; (b) Playwright contentFrame() on the live preview iframe → contains 'TokenForge savings' (FastAPI widget), not the React landing meta; (c) ?theme=light toggle → iframe HTML now contains #FFFFFF; (d) /api/widget.js body now contains '/api/embed/' loader path.
